+    ignore: generatedIgnores,
+  },
+  {
+    name: "test-mixed",
+    targets: ["test"],
+    pattern: "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}",
+    ignore: generatedIgnores,
+  },
 ];
 
 let failed = false;
